doc_title: LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation
notes: LightRAG paper (arXiv 2410.05779v3). Section headings are in uppercase as extracted by MinerU from the paper. Golden annotations are deliberately conservative to detect major regressions, not pixel-perfect layout matches. expected_inline_math_substring: latex expressions known to appear in the paper's equations. has_appendix=true because appendix sections (7.x) are present after references.
